creator: ports@ecadlabs.com
text:
Hi there Martin,

Thanks for taking this update on. I posted an updated diff for the latest release. 

Tested using `poudriere testport`:

VERSION          ARCH 
10.3-RELEASE-p19 amd64
11.0-RELEASE-p10 amd64

Any chance you can get this committed soon?

Many thanks,
-Jev
